texto: Waking up is the dangerous act of worship. It's dangerous because worship is meant to produce lives fully attentive to reality as God sees it, and that's more than most of us want to deal with.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Labberton sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Waking up is the dangerous act of worship. It's dangerous because worship is meant to produce liv…” articula reflexao, worship, dangerous em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
